mainEntity.name: What benefits for back injury from work in South Salt Lake?
mainEntity.text: What benefits for back injury from work in South Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: South Salt Lake workers comp covers back injury medical care PT surgery lost wages PPD if chronic.[7]

suggestedAnswer.text: Common on-the-job back strains in South Salt Lake get conservative treatment first; denials if degenerative. Secure MRI specialist opinion early. PPD awards based AMA guides e.g. 5-20% whole person. Lawyer negotiates higher ratings vs insurer lowballs.[7]

name: Workers Comp Back Injury Benefits South Salt Lake
